data.title: Tower Semiconductor Deepens Xanadu Partnership to Scale Photonic Quantum Hardware
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Tower ( (TSEM) ) has issued an update.

On February 19, 2026, Tower Semiconductor and Canadian photonic quantum computing firm Xanadu announced an expansion of their strategic collaboration to develop advanced silicon photonics for fault-tolerant quantum computers. The companies have co-engineered a custom material stack integrated into Tower’s high-volume silicon photonics platform, aiming to support scalable, high-performance photonic quantum hardware as system complexity increases.

The strengthened partnership builds on a series of successful joint tapeouts that moved Xanadu’s hardware from concept to prototype and demonstrator systems within a manufacturable foundry environment. Current work focuses on optimizing ultra‑low‑loss silicon nitride and integrated photodiodes using standard product flows, positioning Tower’s platform to serve emerging commercial-scale quantum computing while reinforcing its relevance across data centers, telecom and automotive applications.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSEM) stock is a Buy with a $45000.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tower stock, see the TSEM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSEM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSEM is a Outperform.

The score is driven mainly by solid financial strength (notably the strong balance sheet) and supportive technical trend, reinforced by an upbeat earnings call focused on a funded, customer-supported SiPho/SiGe capacity ramp. These positives are tempered by premium valuation (high P/E) and the recent dip into negative free cash flow, plus execution/contract risks highlighted on the call.

To see Spark’s full report on TSEM stock, click here.

More about Tower

Tower Semiconductor Ltd. is a leading foundry of high-value analog semiconductor solutions, providing technology, development and process platforms for customers in consumer, industrial, automotive, mobile, infrastructure, medical, and aerospace and defense markets. Its customizable platforms span silicon photonics, SiGe, BiCMOS, mixed-signal/RF CMOS, image and non-imaging sensors, power management and MEMS, supported by multi-fab manufacturing sites in Israel, the U.S., Japan and a shared 300mm facility in Italy.

Average Trading Volume: 1,872,345

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $14.28B

See more data about TSEM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pennpetro Energy Extends Audit Timeline Ahead of LSE Trading Resumption Bid
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Pennpetro Energy Plc ( (GB:PPP) ) has shared an announcement.

Pennpetro Energy said its auditors, Crowe, will take an additional week to finalise the audit of its 2024/25 accounts, extending completion to 27 February 2026 to further ensure the quality, integrity and corporate governance aspects of the financial statements. Once the audited 2024/25 results and the 2025/26 interim accounts are completed and approved by the board, the company plans to publish them in quick succession and then seek a restoration of trading in its shares on the London Stock Exchange, underscoring the importance of the audit process for its market re-admission and investor confidence.

More about Pennpetro Energy Plc

Pennpetro Energy Plc is a UK-listed company focused on developing strategic traditional and transition energy projects. The group targets opportunities across conventional hydrocarbons and emerging energy transition assets, positioning itself to serve evolving energy demand while navigating public market and regulatory requirements.

Average Trading Volume: 512,108

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £9.57M

Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria ( (ES:BBVA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

BBVA has published its Individual Annual Report and Management Report for the financial year ended December 2025, providing detailed information on the bank’s standalone performance and operations. The release signals the formal availability of BBVA’s year-end 2025 financial and management disclosures, an important reference point for investors, regulators, and other stakeholders monitoring the bank’s financial health and governance.

The publication of these reports helps enhance transparency around BBVA’s activities and results, complementing its consolidated disclosures at group level. This step supports regulatory compliance and offers the market a clearer view of the parent entity’s balance sheet, risk profile, and strategic execution, factors that can influence investor confidence and the bank’s positioning within the European banking sector.

More about Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria

Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria S.A. (BBVA) is a major Spanish banking group operating in retail, corporate, and investment banking, as well as asset management and other financial services. It serves individuals, businesses, and institutional clients across several international markets, with a strong presence in Spain and Latin America.

data.title: Nera Telecommunications Wins S$2.4 Million Cybersecurity Support Contract
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Nera Telecommunications Ltd ( (SG:N01) ) has issued an update.

Nera Telecommunications Ltd has secured a three-year contract worth about S$2.4 million from an established institutional asset management group to provide technical management and operational support for cybersecurity. The mandate includes 24/7 Security Information and Event Management monitoring, Security Operations Centre support, and security operations platform management, strengthening the Group’s push into managed services and enhancing its cybersecurity offerings while contributing positively to its current financial year performance.

The contract underscores Nera Telecommunications’ strategy to deepen its cyber defence competencies and position itself as a provider of integrated, mission-critical IT and security solutions. By winning work from a financial sector client, the Group reinforces its credibility in high-stakes environments and signals potential for further growth in recurring cybersecurity service revenue, which could bolster its competitive standing in the regional telecoms and IT services market.

The most recent analyst rating on (SG:N01) stock is a Hold with a S$0.19 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nera Telecommunications Ltd stock, see the SG:N01 Stock Forecast page.

More about Nera Telecommunications Ltd

Nera Telecommunications Ltd is a Singapore-incorporated company operating in the telecommunications and information technology sector. Through its subsidiaries, the Group focuses on delivering integrated, mission-critical IT infrastructure solutions, with a growing emphasis on managed services and cybersecurity, including Security Operations Centre capabilities for institutional and enterprise customers.

Aarvi Encon Ltd. ( (IN:AARVI) ) has provided an announcement.

Aarvi Encon Ltd. has completed the dispatch of its postal ballot notice along with remote e-voting details to shareholders, and has published the statutory advertisements in English and regional-language newspapers in line with SEBI disclosure norms. The notice and e-voting information are also available on the company’s website and the e-voting service provider’s portal, underscoring Aarvi Encon’s focus on regulatory compliance, transparent communication and enabling shareholder participation in corporate decisions.

This step ensures investors are formally informed about the voting process and timelines, helping facilitate wider participation from dispersed shareholders and reinforcing governance standards expected of listed entities. data.title: Hacksaw Gaming Expands U.S. Reach With Delaware North iCasino Deal in West Virginia
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Hacksaw AB ( (SE:HACK) ) has shared an announcement.

Hacksaw Gaming has entered a new partnership with Delaware North to supply a range of its online casino titles to players in West Virginia via Delaware North’s Betly-branded platform, wv.betly.com. The deal deepens Hacksaw’s footprint in the U.S. iCasino market and leverages Delaware North’s established regional casino and interactive gaming presence, potentially enhancing Betly’s content offering and strengthening both companies’ positions in the competitive digital gambling space.

Delaware North, one of the largest privately owned hospitality and entertainment groups globally, operates regional casinos, hotels, and interactive gaming across multiple U.S. states and Australia, and sees Hacksaw’s innovative games as a way to further elevate Betly’s iCasino experience. For Hacksaw, partnering with a major multi-state operator underscores its growth ambitions in North America and may pave the way for broader content distribution and deeper engagement with West Virginian online casino players.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:HACK) stock is a Buy with a SEK100.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hacksaw AB stock, see the SE:HACK Stock Forecast page.

More about Hacksaw AB

Hacksaw AB is a Stockholm-listed B2B technology platform and game development company focused on the iGaming sector. Its scalable, modular platform supports rapid development and distribution of digital slots, scratch cards, and instant win games, serving major private and state-owned online gaming operators across the value chain from content creation to distribution.

Pinewood Technologies ( (GB:PINE) ) has shared an announcement.

Pinewood Technologies Group PLC disclosed a share dealing by its chief executive officer, William Berman, in line with EU Market Abuse Regulation requirements. Berman purchased 16,035 ordinary shares at a price of £3.095 per share on 19 February 2026, with the transaction executed on the London Stock Exchange.

The purchase increases the CEO’s equity stake in the company and signals management’s financial commitment to Pinewood’s prospects. Such insider buying is closely watched by investors as a potential indicator of confidence in the company’s operational outlook and valuation.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PINE) stock is a Buy with a £550.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pinewood Technologies stock, see the GB:PINE Stock Forecast page.

data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest update is out from Top Glove Bhd ( (TPGVF) ).

Top Glove’s executive chairman Tan Sri Dr Lim Wee Chai acquired 2,000,000 ordinary shares in the company via direct interest on 13 February 2026, for a total consideration of MYR 1.18 million, representing 0.025% of the company’s issued shares. On the same date, executive director Mr Lim Hooi Sin acquired 2,000,000 ordinary shares via indirect interest for the same consideration and percentage, signaling ongoing insider confidence in the group’s prospects and potentially reinforcing market sentiment regarding the company’s valuation and long-term positioning.

More about Top Glove Bhd

Top Glove Corporation Bhd is a Malaysian manufacturer primarily involved in producing rubber gloves and related medical and industrial disposable products for global markets. Listed under the stock name TOPGLOV, the company operates in the healthcare supplies sector and is a major exporter serving hospitals, laboratories and industrial users worldwide.

B2Holding ASA ( (GB:0RIT) ) has shared an update.

B2 Impact ASA, a pan-European debt management specialist, focuses on resolving defaulted loans and boosting liquidity for financial institutions through transparent and ethical collection practices. The Oslo-based group operates across Europe with about 1,430 employees and is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker B2I.

The company has registered a new share capital increase in connection with the exercise of employee share options with the Norwegian Registry of Business Enterprises. Following this registration, B2 Impact’s share capital stands at NOK 37,087,048.50, divided into 370,870,485 shares with a nominal value of NOK 0.10, modestly expanding its equity base and reflecting ongoing use of share-based incentive programs.

More about B2Holding ASA

B2 Impact ASA is a leading pan-European debt management company that provides solutions for defaulted loans and supplies liquidity to financial institutions, supporting a healthier financial system. data.title: Nishi-Nippon Railroad Lifts Profit Outlook on Strong Nine-Month Earnings
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9031) ) is now available.

Nishi-Nippon Railroad reported strong consolidated results for the nine months ended December 31, 2025, with operating revenue up 8.5% year on year to ¥343.6 billion and profit attributable to owners of parent surging 71.9% to ¥27.8 billion, supported by higher ordinary income and improved comprehensive income. The company’s financial position also strengthened, with total assets rising to ¥795.3 billion, shareholders’ equity and the equity ratio improving, and the full-year forecast revised to call for 6.6% revenue growth and a 49% jump in net profit, alongside a planned dividend increase to a total of ¥50 per share, reflecting growing returns to shareholders and the impact of adding six new consolidated subsidiaries including Hinomaru Holdings.

The most recent analyst rating on (JP:9031) stock is a Buy with a Yen3576.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd. stock, see the JP:9031 Stock Forecast page.

More about Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd.

Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd., listed on the Tokyo and Fukuoka exchanges, operates a diversified business centered on transportation and related services. Under Japanese GAAP, it reports consolidated results across segments including rail, bus and other operations that support regional mobility and urban economic activity in western Japan.

Average Trading Volume: 187,471

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy
